scripts.wasm: RUSTFLAGS='-C target-feature=+simd128' wasm-pack build crates/lutify-core --target web --out-dir ../../web/src/wasm --release -- --features wasm && node scripts/check-wasm-boundaries.mjs
scripts.predev: npm run assets && npm run libraw-wasm && npm run wasm
scripts.build: npm run assets && npm run libraw-wasm && npm run wasm && npm run bundle
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run test:e2e:prepared
scripts.test:e2e:prepared: cargo build --quiet --release -p lutify-cli && node scripts/check-libraw-parity.mjs && node scripts/check-libraw-sensor.mjs && playwright test
scripts.test:pages: npm run build:pages && npm run test:pages:prepared
scripts.benchmark:interaction:large: node scripts/fetch-large-raw-fixture.mjs && RAW_PERF=1 RAW_PERF_FIXTURE=${RAW_LARGE_FIXTURE_PATH:-/tmp/lutify-ilce-7rm4-61mp.ARW} RAW_PERF_MIN_PIXELS=33000000 PLAYWRIGHT_HTTP_PORT=${PLAYWRIGHT_HTTP_PORT:-46731} playwright test web/e2e/preview-interaction-performance.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:webgpu-software: npm run build && cargo build --quiet --release -p lutify-cli && npm run test:webgpu-software:prepared
scripts.test:webgpu-software:prepared: python3 tests/fixtures/make_packed_dng.py && VITE_ENABLE_TEST_ENTRIES=1 npm run bundle:test && AAHD_SOFTWARE_E2E=1 AAHD_TILE_E2E=1 WEBGPU_PREVIEW_E2E=1 WEBGPU_SOFTWARE=1 PLAYWRIGHT_HTTP_PORT=${PLAYWRIGHT_HTTP_PORT:-46731} playwright test web/e2e/aahd-tile.spec.ts web/e2e/webgpu-preview-correctness.spec.ts web/e2e/webgpu-production-export.spec.ts --project=chromium --retries=0
scripts.test:webgpu-hardware: npm run build && cargo build --quiet --release -p lutify-cli && npm run test:webgpu-hardware:prepared
scripts.test:webgpu-hardware:prepared: node scripts/prepare-webgpu-camera-fixtures.mjs && VITE_ENABLE_TEST_ENTRIES=1 npm run bundle:test && AAHD_EXPORT_E2E=1 AAHD_EXPORT_MATRIX_E2E=1 WEBGPU_CAMERA_MATRIX_E2E=1 WEBGPU_HARDWARE=1 WEBGPU_PREVIEW=1 XTRANS_PARITY_E2E=1 PLAYWRIGHT_HTTP_PORT=${PLAYWRIGHT_HTTP_PORT:-46731} playwright test web/e2e/aahd-camera-matrix.spec.ts web/e2e/aahd-export.spec.ts web/e2e/raw-compat.spec.ts web/e2e/webgpu-preview.spec.ts web/e2e/xtrans-parity.spec.ts --project=chromium --retries=0
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run build && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
